message:
fix(core): optimize topological sort memory, fix time_series downsampling, formatting cleanup

topological_sort.rs:
- Replace O(n^2) seen matrix with O(n log n) edges vector + sort/dedup
  for cycle detection, reducing memory from quadratic to linear

time_series.rs:
- Fix downsampling algorithm: replace fixed group_size chunking with
  proportional step-based resampling for correct temporal alignment
- Add missing self.total_evicted += start accounting in merge_sorted()
  to prevent drift between reported and actual eviction counts

dataflow.rs:
- Reformat conditional branches to multi-line for readability

storage.rs:
- Reformat method chain calls for readability

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
